calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Continued To Oct-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 502

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 304

ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-12-26 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via Zoom:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs and moving party Norman Johnson.
Robert Kraft of BASSI EDLIN HUIE & BLUM (415-397-9006), appearing for defendant Parker-Hannifin Corporation.
Alexandra Sologub of WFBM, LLP (714-634-2522), appearing for defendant General Electric Company and Paramount Global, Inc.

RULING:
Hearing held, argued, and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial, and Extending Discovery cutoff is DENIED without prejudice. The Court does not find at this time that the moving papers and counsel's declaration support a finding that Plaintiff's prognosis is such that preference is necessary to prevent prejudicing his interests in the litigation. No opposition filed. Plaintiff may re-file their motion should circumstances change. Order signed in open court. Judge: Rochelle C. East, Clerk: A. Mok. Reporter: Veronica Rodriguez, CSR #12215 (Tel: 323-445-6798) Email: bzyfngrz@yahoo.com. (301/RCE)
